---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

My CV is available as a PDF. You can view and download it using the button below, or via the **CV** link in the top navigation bar.

[{{< fa file-pdf >}} Download My CV](cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}

---

## Summary

**Your Name** | Dublin, Ireland | your@email.com

Final-year BSc Data Science & Analytics student with hands-on experience in Python, machine learning, and data visualisation. Internship-tested in a production data environment. Seeking graduate roles from Summer 2025.

---

::: {.callout-note}
The full CV (PDF) includes complete work history, education details, and references. Please use the download button above to access it.
:::
